originalTitle: Stocks rally when Congress goes on summer break. Here’s why.
summary: Stock prices face greater volatility when lawmakers are active, driven entirely by the regulatory uncertainty they create.
content: Stock prices face greater volatility when lawmakers are active, driven entirely by the regulatory uncertainty they create.
chineseTitle: 国会暑假期间股市上涨。原因如下。
chineseSummary: 当立法者表现活跃时，股票价格将面临更大的波动，这完全是由他们造成的监管不确定性驱动的。
chineseContent: 当立法者表现活跃时，股票价格将面临更大的波动，这完全是由他们造成的监管不确定性驱动的。
whyItMatters: 这条信息属于财经市场信号，适合用于观察利率、汇率、股债商品、金融机构和宏观政策变化。
